display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Reserved for the largest cinematic moments. Maximum one per viewport.

headline.purpose: Section titles, article headings, category headers. The workhorse of editorial hierarchy.

title.purpose: Card titles, sidebar widget headings, sub-section labels.

body.purpose: Article paragraphs, descriptions, long-form content. Capped at 65–75ch per line.

label.purpose: Navigation links, badges, metadata, buttons. Increased tracking for air.

shadows.name: hero-aura
shadows.purpose: Ambient field around the hero section. Diffuse, large-radius, low opacity.

shadows.name: content-glow
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift under hero content panels and featured cards.

shadows.name: accent-bloom
shadows.purpose: Warm directional glow for floating back-to-top button and primary CTAs only.

shadows.name: dark-vignette
shadows.purpose: Inner shadow inside hero shells to draw the eye toward the center. Cinematic, not decorative.

motion.name: ease-cinematic
motion.purpose: Entrance and exit animations. Long, elegant deceleration.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions: panel reveals, opacity changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The dominant action CTA. Gold on dark. Precision instrument feel.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.85rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; background-color: #D4AF37; color: #0F172A; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(0.92); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4AF37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Icon-only circular control for carousels and secondary actions. Glass-like at rest, gold hint on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Next slide"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"></polyline></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.85rem; height: 2.85rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); border-radius: 9999px; background-color: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.34); color: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 250ms ease, background-color 250ms ease, border-color 250ms ease, color 250ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.14); border-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.38); color: #fff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4AF37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Hero Content Panel
components.description: The glass-like panel that holds hero headline, excerpt, and metadata. Sits at the bottom of the hero shell.
components.html:

10 دقائق15 مايو 2026
components.css: .ds-hero-panel { width: min(100%, 42rem); padding: clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, 2rem); border-radius: 1.75rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)), rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2); color: #fff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif; direction: rtl; text-align: right; } .ds-hero-panel__eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.16); color: #F8E4A1; border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.24); font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; backdrop-filter: blur(18px); } .ds-hero-panel__title { margin: 0 0 1rem; font-size: clamp(2.1rem, 4.5vw, 4.25rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.08; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 1.25rem 2.5rem rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.35); } .ds-hero-panel__excerpt { width: min(100%, 34rem); margin: 0 0 1.25rem; font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw, 1.2rem); line-height: 1.95; color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.82); } .ds-hero-panel__meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 0.7rem; font-size: 0.95rem; color: rgba(226, 232, 240, 0.74); } .ds-hero-panel__dot { width: 0.35rem; height: 0.35rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.9); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Article Card
components.description: Standard article teaser. Flat at rest, subtle border shift on hover. No shadow.
components.html:

مقتطف قصير من المقال يجذب القارئ للنقر.

10 دقائق · 15 مايو 2026
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background-color: #F1F5F9; border: 1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 0.3s ease; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif; direction: rtl; text-align: right; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3); } .ds-card__media { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; background: linear-gradient(130deg, #0F172A, #1E293B); } .ds-card__body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card__category { display: inline-block; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #D4AF37; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-card__title { margin: 0 0 0.75rem; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; color: #0F172A; } .ds-card__excerpt { margin: 0 0 1rem; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; color: #475569; } .ds-card__meta { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #94A3B8; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Editorial tag or category marker. Pill-shaped, gold-tinted flat surface.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 2rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.16); color: #F8E4A1; border: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.24); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif; font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Sticky header navigation item. Subtle, precise, gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 0; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #64748B; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #D4AF37; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D4AF37; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page'] { color: #D4AF37; border-bottom-color: #D4AF37; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Minimal search field with hairline border. No background at rest.
components.css: .ds-input-search { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #F8FAFC; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; outline: none; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.7); } .ds-input-search:focus { border-bottom-color: #D4AF37; }

narrative.overview: The interface is not a container for content; it is the lighting that sculpts content out of darkness. Every surface exists in a state of controlled luminance: deep shadows provide rest for the eye, while precise, warm highlights draw attention to what matters. The mood is intentional, expensive, and reverent. This system rejects the clutter of generic news portals and the raw utility of database-driven layouts. It also rejects neon saturation and aggressive motion. The aesthetic philosophy is one of quiet authority: the design knows it is beautiful and does not need to shout. The Arab cinephile enters a lean-back, winding-down experience where discovery feels like wandering a curated gallery at dusk.
keyCharacteristics: Chiaroscuro-first: Contrast is not an afterthought; it is the primary design grammar.
Ambient depth: Elevation is conveyed through atmosphere (glow, haze, blur), not structural stacking.
Whisper-light precision: Interactions are sharp, fast, and subtle. No chunky buttons, no heavy shadows.
RTL-native: Arabic right-to-left reading order is the default, not an adaptation.
Respectful motion: Cinematic motion serves the experience, never overrides prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Aged Gold Leaf is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If you find yourself using it for more than focus states, active indicators, and one primary CTA per view, you have diluted the prestige.

rules.name: The Dark-First Rule
rules.body: Design for the dark palette first, then derive the light palette. The physical scene is an Arab cinephile browsing on a tablet at night; the default ambient light is low.

rules.name: The Breath Rule
rules.body: Arabic text needs more line-height than Latin. Body copy is set to line-height 2.0. Never compress Arabic body text below 1.75.

rules.name: The No-Plastic Rule
rules.body: If a shadow looks like it could exist in a productivity app (Trello, Asana, Gmail), it is forbidden. Shadows must feel like light behavior, not elevation mechanics.

dos: Do design for the dark palette first. The physical scene is low ambient light.
Do use Aged Gold Leaf exclusively for focus rings, active states, one primary CTA per view, and progress indicators.
Do maintain line-height: 2 for all Arabic body text.
Do use backdrop-filter: blur() for atmospheric panels, not for decorative glass cards.
Do cap body text at 65–75ch per line.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion by disabling all cinematic animations and transitions.
Do use diffuse, large-radius shadows that feel like theater haze, never sharp offset shadows.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, callouts, or lists. This is an absolute ban. Use full borders, background tints, or leading icons instead.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Decorative, never meaningful. Use a single solid color and emphasize via weight or size.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default. Blurs and glass cards are rare and purposeful, or nothing.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent). SaaS cliché.
Don't create identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text, repeated endlessly).
Don't use modals as a first thought. Exhaust inline and progressive alternatives first.
Don't design like a generic news portal. No cluttered sidebars, red breaking-news tickers, or clickbait density.
Don't create a 'Letterboxd' utility feel. No heavy grids of raw poster data, star ratings, or database aesthetics.
Don't use neon or gamer aesthetics. No high-saturation neons, fast animations, or aggressive motion. Think opera house, not gaming lounge.
Don't use em dashes. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
